iti25:1.1: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti25:2.1: “Monks, for the person who transgresses in one thing, I tell you, there is no evil deed that is not to be done.
iti25:3.2: who transgresses in this one thing,
iti25:3.3: transcending concern for the world beyond:
iti25:3.4: there’s no evil not to be done.
